description: No plugin is common to all mobile stacks - extension point plus auth0 as an opt-in option relevant across every mobile stack.

plugins.description: Auth0's official plugin - 25 skills covering Android, iOS/macOS, Expo, and React Native auth setup. OPT-IN: not included in `merge.enabledPlugins`, won't auto-enable just because a mobile stack was detected. Free tier (25,000 MAU, unlimited social logins) covers everything the skill sets up.

_notes: See README.md's 'Related tools' section for Android/iOS non-plugin tooling and the Claude Design / Figma UI-handoff options.
